mnemonics: C.R.A.S.H. Before You Buy: Consider Requirements, Analyze Scalability, Forecast Headroom.
keyPoints: Align purchases with current and future business needs, not just technical specs.
Calculate Total Cost of Ownership (TCO), not just the initial purchase price.
Plan for scalability and future growth to avoid premature obsolescence.
commonMistakes: Underestimating future growth, leading to insufficient capacity shortly after purchase.
Focusing only on hardware cost while neglecting software, support, and power/cooling costs.
Making a capital expenditure (CapEx) decision when an operational expenditure (OpEx) model (like cloud) is more suitable.
